name: prd
prompt:
Generate a Product Requirements Document for: {input}

Include: Overview, Goals, User Stories, Requirements, Success Metrics, Timeline.

name: user-story
summarize
prompt: Summarize the key points, decisions, and action items from this discussion.

name: decisions
prompt: Search for and list product/technical decisions related to: {input}

name: design-review
prompt:
Provide a design review for: {input}

Consider: UX, accessibility, consistency, technical feasibility, user needs.

name: api-spec
prompt:
Generate an API specification for: {input}

Include: endpoints, parameters, request/response formats, authentication, error codes.
